info.description: Monitor how AI search engines see your products. BotSee queries multiple AI models (OpenAI, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Grok) with your target questions and analyzes which competitors, sources, and keywords appear in responses.
info.title: BotSee API
info.x-cli-description: Have your agents measure and improve your brand's AI Visibility with botsee.io. Run audits across every major LLM, see what's missing, then get specific recommendations and ready-to-publish content to close the gap. API-first, agent-native

Retry-After.description: Seconds to wait before retrying. Returned on 429 responses.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Total requests allowed per window (currently 600 per minute).

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window for the caller's bucket.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the current window resets.

NotFound.description: The requested resource does not exist or is not accessible.

PaymentRequired.description: Payment required (insufficient credits or x402 challenge).

RateLimited.description: Too many requests. Wait and retry per Retry-After header.

Unauthorized.description: Missing, invalid, or revoked API key.

ValidationError.description: Request body or parameters failed validation.

PaymentRequirements.description: x402 payment requirements returned in 402 responses.

items.description: Payment scheme accepted by the server (chain, asset, payTo, maxAmountRequired, etc.).

RateLimitHeaders.description: Documentation reference for rate-limit response headers. Actual values are returned in HTTP response headers (x-ratelimit-limit, x-ratelimit-remaining, x-ratelimit-reset, retry-after on 429).

reset_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the bucket resets.

data.description: Event-specific payload. See /api/v1/webhooks/events for per-event schemas.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC time the event was emitted.

get.description: Returns aggregated keywords/search terms from all responses.
Lists all customer types for a site.

post.description: Creates a customer type manually. Costs 5 credits.

get.description: Returns the organization's billing settings and current credit balance.

patch.description: Updates the organization's monthly spend limit. Other settings are read-only via this endpoint.

monthly_spend_limit_cents.description: Maximum spend per calendar month in cents. Cannot exceed max_monthly_spend_cents.

delete.description: Deletes a webhook. Returns 204 No Content on success.

204.description: No content. Operation succeeded with empty body.

post.description: Uses AI to generate customer types based on the site's product and value proposition. Costs 5 credits per generated type.

count.description: Number of customer types to generate

post.description: Discovery call without payment headers returns 402 and does not require auth. Final paid retry requires API key (Authorization, x-api-key, or api_key query param) and supports both `payment` and `payment-signature` headers. Method-compatible with POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE.

parameters.name: authorization
parameters.description: Required on final paid retry when using Bearer auth. Format: Bearer bts_live_...

parameters.name: x-api-key
parameters.description: Alternative to Authorization on final paid retry

parameters.name: api_key
parameters.description: Alternative auth for facilitator-driven final paid retry

parameters.name: payment
parameters.description: Base64-encoded payment payload. Omit for discovery challenge; include on final paid retry.

amount_cents.description: Amount in USD cents (250-100000, i.e., $2.50-$1000). Optional for discovery-only 402 challenge (defaults to configured discovery amount).

delete.description: Deletes a question. Returns 204 No Content on success.

204.description: No content. Operation succeeded with empty body.

put.description: Updates a question. Only include fields you want to change.

get.description: Lists all registered webhooks for the organization.

post.description: Registers a webhook URL. Returns the webhook with its signing secret (shown only once).

events.description: Events to subscribe to. Call GET /api/v1/webhooks/events for the canonical catalog of currently-emitted event types and their payload schemas.

url.description: HTTPS URL to receive webhook payloads

post.description: Uses AI to generate personas based on the customer type. Costs 5 credits per persona. Optionally pass `prompt` to steer the LLM toward a specific persona within the customer segment (requires `count: 1`).

prompt.description: Free-text hint (max 2000 chars) that steers generation toward a specific persona. Only supported with count: 1. When omitted, the generator produces diverse personas across the customer segment.

get.description: Returns competitors mentioned in responses, grouped by customer type. Each competitor includes appearance percentage (% of responses mentioning them), mentions count, average ranking, and confidence scores.

delete.description: Archives a site. Returns 204 No Content on success.

204.description: No content. Operation succeeded with empty body.

get.description: Returns a site with its customer types and persona counts.

Returns sources that AI cited in responses where your brand was NOT mentioned. These are high-value targets for outreach or content placement — getting coverage on these sources may improve your AI visibility.
Returns the catalog of event types this API can emit, with JSON Schemas per event. Use this to self-discover available events programmatically without parsing the full OpenAPI doc.

post.description: Atomically creates a new API key with the same name and revokes the old one. Returns the new raw key once.

get.description: Polls the status of a signup token. Returns 'pending', 'completed', or 'expired'.
Returns credit balance, auto-charge settings, and paginated transaction history.

post.description: Starts an analysis run. This is asynchronous - poll GET /api/v1/analysis/:uuid for status. Returns 202 Accepted.

models.description: AI models: openai, claude, perplexity, gemini, grok

target_uuids.description: Required for non-site scope. UUIDs of customer types, personas, or questions.

delete.description: Archives a persona. Returns 204 No Content on success.

204.description: No content. Operation succeeded with empty body.

get.description: Returns a persona with its questions.

put.description: Updates a persona. Only include fields you want to change.

get.description: Lists all questions for a persona.

post.description: Creates a question manually. Free operation.

question.description: The question text to ask AI models

post.description: Creates a USDC signup token. Use `no_email: true` for autonomous agent flows (no setup_url returned).

no_email.description: Set to true for autonomous agents that skip email verification

get.description: Lists analysis runs for a site with optional filters.
Returns a paginated list of sites for the organization.

post.description: Creates a new site. Auto-generates product_name and value_proposition from URL if not provided (5 credits).

domain.description: Domain override (extracted from URL if not provided)

product_name.description: Product name (auto-generated from URL if not provided, costs 5 credits)

value_proposition.description: Value proposition (auto-generated from URL if not provided, costs 5 credits)

get.description: Returns credit usage breakdown per API key.

post.description: Validates the API key and returns organization info and credit balance.

delete.description: Archives a customer type. Returns 204 No Content on success.

204.description: No content. Operation succeeded with empty body.

get.description: Returns a customer type with its personas.

put.description: Updates a customer type. Only include fields you want to change.

get.description: Returns account details including company name, site count, and owner information.

post.description: Call without `payment` header to get a 402 challenge and `payment-required` details. Use Pinch or Coinbase CDP Agentic Wallet to generate the payment header and retry.

parameters.name: payment
parameters.description: Omit this header to receive 402 payment-required challenge

get.description: Returns the caller's current rate-limit state without consuming additional budget. Useful for agents that want to back off proactively before hitting 429.

post.description: Fires a synthetic webhook.test event to the registered URL via the standard delivery worker. Useful for end-to-end testing of signature verification on the subscriber side. Returns 202 with the enqueued Oban job id.

get.description: Lists all personas for a customer type.

post.description: Creates a persona manually. Costs 5 credits.
Uses AI to generate questions based on the persona and site context. Costs 10 credits flat.
Generates actionable recommendations from the analysis (cached after first call). Costs 5 credits the first time; subsequent calls return the cached result.
Creates a credit-card signup token. USDC signups must use `/api/v1/signup/usdc`.
Exchanges a one-time reset token (from email) for a fresh API key. Public endpoint — no Bearer auth required, the token authenticates the request.
post.summary: Reset API key with one-time token

token.description: Single-use reset token from the reset email.

post.description: Generates a blog post from analysis results for a specific question. Costs 15 credits.

question_uuid.description: Question UUID to base the post on

get.description: Returns the credit cost for each chargeable operation. Analysis costs are estimates; the actual debit is computed from real LLM usage at the documented multiplier after the run completes.
Returns analysis results for a specific question. Use the `fields` parameter to include additional data (keywords, competitors, sources, responses).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated fields: keywords, competitors, sources, responses. Default: keywords only.

get.description: Returns aggregated sources cited across all responses, with own_company_mentioned flag.
Returns analysis details including status. Poll this endpoint until status is 'completed' or 'failed'.
Returns raw AI model responses for the analysis.
Lists all API keys for the organization (raw key never returned).

post.description: Creates a new API key. The raw key is returned only once in the response body — store it immediately.

delete.description: Revokes an API key. You cannot revoke the key being used to make this request — use rotate or another key.

204.description: No content. Operation succeeded with empty body.

get.description: Returns questions where your brand's mention rate is below a threshold. Use this to discover which queries you should target with content. Results include a per-provider breakdown with the search keywords used and your brand's rank position.

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Mention rate threshold (0.0–1.0). Questions where mention_rate < threshold are returned. Default 1.0 returns any question where brand was missed at least once.

parameters.name: rank_threshold
parameters.description: Also flag questions where brand appeared at rank worse than this value, even if mention rate meets the threshold.
